entity.summary: Multi-chain decentralized exchange and token-launch trading protocol combining Uniswap V2 and V3 swap venues with immediate V3 trading, permanently locked launch liquidity, graduation mechanics, and creator-fee distribution across newly launched EVM networks.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation present NOXA DEX and NOXA Fun as products of one protocol identity rather than separate exchanges. Current independent metrics report non-zero spot swap volume across multiple networks. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: NOXA official website
evidence.notes: First-party protocol website identifies the integrated DEX and launchpad ecosystem and exposes current launch, trade, earn, documentation, and DEX surfaces.

evidence.title: NOXA protocol introduction
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes NOXA DEX as a V2 and V3 exchange and NOXA Fun as an immediate-trading V3 launch product deployed across new chains.
